meta.title: Interests Explorations
meta.subtitle: I spent time figuring out what I actually wanted to build. I moved through cybersecurity, blockchain, and graphics programming — not always with a clear direction, but always paying attention to what resonated and what didn't. Over time, a pattern emerged: the problems that kept pulling me back were visual, three-dimensional, and mathematically grounded. That realization led me to where I am now — building foundations in machine learning and computer vision, with a growing focus on 3D vision.

entries.heading: Deep Learning & Computer Vision (ML & CV)
entries.content: Focusing on deep learning architectures and computer vision. Using PyTorch to implement and experiment with neural networks while working to close the gap between mathematical theory and practical application.

entries.heading: Computer Graphics
entries.content: Explored the 3D graphics pipeline and real-time rendering through OpenGL and GLSL shader programming. Worked with GPU memory management, spatial transformations, and lighting models to build a more concrete low-level programming foundation.

entries.heading: Cyber Security & Cloud
entries.content: Explored cloud computing with a focus on security practices and infrastructure deployment on AWS.

entries.heading: Cyber Security
entries.content: Focused on web security fundamentals and participated in CTF competitions to sharpen practical problem-solving skills.

entries.heading: The Beginning: Logic & OOP Foundations
entries.content: Started my software engineering journey with C++, learning the fundamentals of logic and object-oriented programming.
